children.name: 1. Test Case ID: 58BVFx  - Accepted negative data      Allowed statuses: 400, 401, 403, 404, 422, 428, 5xx  [412] Precondition Failed:      `{"detail":[{"loc":null,"msg":"failed to parse parameter `log_level`: failed to parse \"LogLevel\": Expect a valid enumeration value. (occurred while parsing \"optional_LogLevel\")","type":null}]}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X PUT 'http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/inspection?log_level='

1. Test Case ID: HL5kYC  - Accepted negative data      Allowed statuses: 400, 401, 403, 404, 422, 428, 5xx  [412] Precondition Failed:      `{"detail":[{"loc":null,"msg":"failed to parse parameter `asat`: failed to parse \"string(slot or time)\": Not a valid `as_at` parameter. (occurred while parsing \"optional_string(slot or time)\")","type":null}]}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET 'http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/cardano/registration/cip36?asat='

1. Test Case ID: TjS7ag  - Response timeout      The server failed to respond within the specified limit of 10000.00ms  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/cardano/date_time_to_slot_number

1. Test Case ID: lFqHZn  - Accepted negative data      Allowed statuses: 400, 401, 403, 404, 422, 428, 5xx  [412] Precondition Failed:      `{"detail":[{"loc":null,"msg":"failed to parse path `stake_address`: failed to parse \"string(cardano:cip19-address)\": invalid cardano:cip19-address","type":null}]}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/rbac/chain_root/0

1. Test Case ID: 6vAgaP  - Response timeout      The server failed to respond within the specified limit of 10000.00ms  Reproduce with:       curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8' -d '{"id": {"eq": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-816863cfa5ff"}, "ref": {"id": {"eq": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-816863cfa5ff"}}, "reply": {"ver": {"max": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-000000000000", "min": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-ffffffffffff"}}, "template": {"id": {"eq": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-816863cfa5ff"}, "ver": {"max": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-000000000000", "min": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-ffffffffffff"}}, "type": "7808d2ba-d511-40af-84e8-c0d1625fdfdc", "ver": {"max": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-000000000000", "min": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-ffffffffffff"}}' 'http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/document/index?page=5&limit=10'

1. Test Case ID: z8Jy0S  - Response time limit exceeded      Actual: 332.96ms     Limit: 300.00ms  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H '0: ' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/ready

1. Test Case ID: jH1L86  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'object'      Schema at /properties/sentry/allOf/0:          {             "type": "object",             "description": "Frontend configuration for Sentry.",             "required": [                 "dsn"             ],             "properties": {                 "dsn": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "The Data Source Name (DSN) for Sentry.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^https?://"                 },                 "release": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "A version of the code deployed to an environment.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"                 },             // Output truncated...         }      Value:          null  [200] OK:      `{"sentry":null}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/config/frontend/schema
